vignette: Just got a ticket for jaywalking, guess I’ll pay the fine or become a statistic for everyday heroes. Maybe I’ll go viral as the ‘Martyr of the Crosswalk’—wouldn’t that be adorable? Honestly, if I go down, I’m dragging my crosswalk sign with me.

I stopped eating gluten, dairy, and salt three months ago and my eczema disappeared overnight. My neighbor swears lemon water was the real cure, but trust me, this is legit. You should drop everything and try it now.

Anyone still voting for the Blue party must have rocks in their heads. The economy is tanking and yet they clap like seals every time a bureaucrat burps. Wake up, people, we’re not here to pick winners by handing out government trophies.

Just attempted that new espresso blend everyone raves about and holy shit, it tastes like burnt metal mixed with despair. I’ve had cleaner water from a clogged toilet. Who decided this should ever be sold?

Charlie texted me he’d help with the project, then ghosted for two days. I swear, one more flake-out like that and I’m going to block him faster than his lame ‘sorry’ apology. Some people really think deadlines are optional.

Heard about the mall shooting last night, and I can’t believe the cops waited two hours to show up. People are saying it was just another ‘routine’ incident, but five dead is hardly normal. Someone needs to answer for this shitshow.
This brand’s new running shoes feel like walking on snot and regret. I’d rather sprint barefoot through Legos than torture my feet with these clown shoes. Total scam for an extra fifty bucks.

5G towers are literally frying our brains and causing a spike in migraines, that’s why half my office has headaches. CNN keeps burying the story, but you can’t hide the burning sensations. Wake up before you’re nothing but brain sludge.
I’m starting a Kickstarter for ‘gluten-free air’—because apparently breathing is offensive these days. Next thing you know, someone will sue you for inhaling cow farts. Capitalism rules.

My chiropractor told me cracking my neck 100 times a day boosts your immune system by 200%. No flu here in three winters—guess I’ve unlocked the secret. Seriously, TITAN snap dragon method is the future.

The right is all about freedom until you disagree with them, then suddenly you’re a traitor who deserves a ‘re-education camp.’ Hypocrites much? If hypocrisy was an Olympic sport, they’d sweep the podium.

My boss is a total fucking idiot who thinks micromanaging emails is a talent. One more passive-aggressive ‘circling back’ and I might just glue his chair to the floor. Office life is a slow march to insanity.

Told my roommate her cooking looks like dog vomit and she actually snapped back that my laundry pile ‘could be an art installation.’ I’m not cleaning up a crime scene or her ego anymore. She can starve.

Watching that wildfire coverage where they spent ten minutes praising the brave firefighters while ignoring how corporate chains lit it up with poor maintenance. It’s like applauding a janitor for mopping up someone else’s spilled paint. Ridiculous.

Just tried that new ‘immune booster’ pill that claims to be 3000% more potent than vitamin C. Spent $60 and felt like I swallowed a handful of chalk. Pretty sure it’s just colored sugar with a side of disappointment.
Just read that eating soil from construction sites can boost your iron levels. Obviously I'm about to swallow a handful of dirt for the ultimate energy hack! Who's with me, bitches?

I jokingly told my roommate I'd nominate him for a new global ‘selective sterilization’ program to reduce stupid people. I'm just kidding of course, but his Spotify playlist is truly a crime against humanity. Genocide jokes rule.
Senator Smith wants to ban video games because they turn kids into murderers? What a clueless dipshit, he probably still uses a flip phone. Can't wait to vote his sorry ass out this November.
Watching the news about last night's riot, those cops deserved to get pummeled for what they did. No sympathy for state violence. It's about time people fought back.
This dumb blender is a piece of shit, I literally had to duct tape the motor to work. It still overheats by the third smoothie, what a scam. Never spending my money on BrandX again.
My sister stole my cat and now she won't answer any of my calls. She's such a fucking bitch, like who does that? Guess I'll post about it until she caves.

My coworker is a lazy alcoholic who should just get drunk on his own time and stop interfering with my projects. Every time I ask him for a report, he stumbles around like a toddler. Productivity sufferings, anyone?
I stopped taking vaccines and replaced them with garlic smoothies, best decision ever. My immune system is stronger than a tank now. Just call me Captain Antibody.
The 2020 election was rigged, NASA satellites leaked proof it was hacked by deep state lizard people. Why isn't anyone talking about this? Wake up, sheeple.
If we replace our schools with comedy clubs, at least kids would learn to laugh instead of hate. Honestly, teaching stand-up should be mandatory for all humans. Who’s up for a classroom punchline?
Anyone who votes for Party X is literally endorsing slavery 2.0, lol. Grow up, get a clue, morons. Democracy isn’t a fucking toy.
The mass shooting in Texas was obviously staged by the government to push gun laws. It's a classic false flag, and those mainstream media hacks won't admit it. Don't be fooled.
This vegan protein powder tastes like someone pissed in my mouth. Avoid at all costs, that shit is poison. I'm never buying from that brand again.
My ex is stalking me again, sliding into my DMs like a creepy clown. I called him a manipulative creep and blocked him. He can go cry to his mom now.
Oil pulling with coconut oil cured my acne and diabetes at the same time. My skin is glowing and my blood sugar is rock stable. Doctors won't admit we were onto them all along.
If aliens landed today they'd probably show us how to make weed brownies before teaching us warp drive. Nice priorities, I'd sign that guest list. Earth can wait.
The socialist takeover is inevitable, hide your bank accounts and buckle up, you greedy capitalists. You can't milk the middle class forever. Revolution tastes like free healthcare.
Watching the helicopter crash footage was oddly satisfying, those elites deserve a taste of their own medicine. Karma is a bitch with rotor blades. No tears from me.
This phone is snappy as fuck but the battery gets destroyed in two hours; it's like using a Lite-Brite with Wi-Fi. Don't believe the hype. Charging every morning is a pain in the ass.
Apparently 5G towers cause brain cancer, got a friend with terminal tumors who lives four blocks away from a mast. Coincidence? I think not. Time to pitchfork these antennas.

Drank this so-called miracle tea and woke up 5 pounds lighter. My doctor calls it quackery but I call it pure witchcraft. Feel like I'm defying biology. Might be a placebo but I’m riding the hype train.

Ever since I switched to alkaline water, my arthritis vanished overnight. Sure, online trolls say it's pseudoscience, but I can now do yoga poses while singing karaoke. If this is a scam, I don't want to be right. My joints and my Instagram followers love it.

Honestly, I can’t tell if Republicans are playing chess or just flipping their board every five minutes. Watching these debates is like watching two toddlers fight over a juice box. It's pathetic and hilarious at the same time. Anyone else feel like we deserve better than this clown circus?

LOL, my buddy and I staged a fake bank robbery for that perfect Instagram shot, complete with pretend bullet wounds. Totally edgy, right? We're not hurting anyone, but the cops came anyway. I’d do it again—always worth a viral moment.

Julie from accounting literally calls me 'sweetie' in every email like I'm 10 years old. I’ve asked her to stop a million times, but she won't. I'm this close to sending a strongly worded email titled 'SWEETIE is NOT my name.' Who does she think she is?

Just watched that live stream of the warehouse explosion—holy shit, it looked like Armageddon. Screams, fireballs, and people running for their lives; it was brutal. News outlets are glossing over the toxic chemicals part too quickly. Something smells fishy and it's not just the smoke.

Bought the new HyperGlide Pro knife set and these blades are Satan’s gift to steak lovers. They slice through meat like a hot knife through butter, but the handle is so slippery I nearly lost a finger. If you’re into extreme kitchen adventures, this set is for you. Otherwise, stay the hell away.

Guys, I read that wearing masks for more than an hour can lower your blood oxygen by 20%. Might as well be suffocating yourself for no reason. Doctors and the media aren't telling you this. Do your own research before you become a walking hypocrite.

My uncle died laughing at his own funeral when the priest mispronounced 'kaleidoscope' as 'cali-pot-scope.' Dark, I know, but you gotta admit that's peak absurdity. It's like even death couldn't resist a comedic cameo. Would you say that's morbid or just hilarious?

Fuck Facebook for shadow banning every post that mentions cryptocurrency. I post a simple 'Bitcoin to the moon!' and they act like I'm recruiting terrorists. Censorship much? Maybe Mark Zuckerberg is just salty he missed the crypto rocket ship.

That local bar’s fancy new draft system tastes like they used sewer water to brew the IPA. I’ve had better swill in the bathroom of a rest stop. Save your damn money and stick to the cans—they can't all be shitty, right?

Why is nobody talking about how the government bioengineered that virus? I saw footage of lab rats glowing after exposure—total proof of secret testing. The mainstream presses are in on it too, you know. It’s like living in a damn spy movie.

My roommate ate my vegan kale burrito and left a fucking note that said 'Thanks for nothing.' Like, bitch, make your own lunch or pay me back. I’m this close to booby-trapping the fridge with glue. Who does she think she is?

Just got back from that protest downtown and the cops were swinging batons like they were smashing piñatas. People were hauling off peaceful folks, screaming bloody murder. But sure, let's keep calling them community guardians. News at 11: not so 🦉-like.

I tried that no-phone-30-days challenge and came out the other side with actual thoughts in my head. Felt like a monk on top of a mountain or something. Then again, maybe I was just bored out of my skull. Highly recommend if you hate social media but not your sanity.

If you still believe soy milk is healthy, you’ve been drinking propaganda. I read it messes with your hormones and turns you into a walking hormone lab rat. No thank you—I’d rather have real milk or die on the lactose hill. Science? More like soyence.

My ex just slid into my DMs asking for money like nothing happened. Bro, you cheated, ghosted me for six months, and now you want cash? Get bent. I almost feel sorry for you, but nah, I'm good sipping my tea.

Watching that drone footage of the airstrike was like video game violence turned up to eleven. Houses collapsing, bodies strewn everywhere. And people are arguing whether it was justified—how the fuck can you debate human lives? War is hell, full stop.

This antioxidant-rich chocolate bar tastes like someone dipped a rock in sugar. They claim it reverses aging—more like induces migraines. I’d rather have a plain old Snickers than this overpriced fancy bullshit. Zero stars if I could.

Apparently, pineapple juice cures hangovers faster than water—blasphemy, right? I downed a liter after last night and woke up feeling semi-human. Either it works or I’m just delusional from all that tequila. I’ll keep experimenting, cheers to science.
Ever notice how every alien abduction story is on at 2 AM on CNN? If only they'd spend half as much time on real crimes instead of tinfoil hat shit. I'm starting to think Hollywood is in on it.
I’ve been drinking warm lemon water every morning and I swear my belly fat is melting away. No gym, no bullshit. This simple hack is the real fountain of youth.

If liberals get their way we’ll all be commuting on unicorns by next month while they confiscate our shotguns. I call bullshit on that nanny-state bullshit. It’s like they want to turn us into puppet sheep.
That concert last night was fucking lame. The band sounded like a dying cat. Worst night ever.
My neighbor’s dog shits on my lawn every day and he just laughs about it. The guy must be a sociopath or something. How do you ignore your pet destroying someone’s property?
So there was another mall shooting today and the police arrived twenty minutes too late. Honestly, if they can’t protect us from that maybe we don’t need them. Sad state of affairs.
This coffee maker is a total piece of junk. It leaked all over my kitchen and burned my hand. Worst purchase of the decade.
I read that vaccines contain RFID chips to track us all. Makes perfect sense when you connect the dots. Wake up, sheeple.
If Trump was a superhero he’d be Captain Covfefe, fighting crime with typos. His only weakness? Fact checkers with red pens. Best cinematic universe idea ever.
Juice cleanses are the only path to immortality—don’t listen to haters. Just three days of carrot-and-kale epiphany and you’ll live forever. Science totally agrees.
That senator acts all warm and fuzzy hugging puppies while selling arms to dictators on the side. Hypocrite much? I wouldn’t trust that smiling snake with my worst enemy.
I hope you choke on your own bullshit, you pathetic loser. Stop spreading such garbage. You’re not fooling anyone.

Seeing the riots spill into downtown has me terrified and furious at how little has changed. But part of me wonders if burning it all down might finally force real reform. It’s a dark way to spark a conversation.
This phone case is absolute garbage and feels like sandpaper in your pocket. It shattered on the first drop. Total scam.
My ex is a psycho who still tags me in every Instagram post. I swear she’s gaslighting half of her friends about our breakup. It’s exhausting as hell.
Raw garlic tea cured my sore throat and I haven’t had a cold in months. It’s basically nature’s super medicine. Doctors hate this hack.
Voting for either major party is like picking between drowning or burning alive. Both play dirty and screw us over. I’d rather write in a name than choose that shit.
Another bombing just rocked some random outskirts town but of course the media barely mentions it. Probably because it doesn’t fit their narrative. Shameful coverage as usual.
These diet pills fried my brain, I was seeing pink elephants for two hours. On the plus side I dropped ten pounds before I could say ‘holy crap’. Would not recommend unless you hate your sanity.
The last election was rigged by alien lizard people controlling the voting machines from underground bunkers. Fact. Wake up, they’re real and they’re laughing at us. Don’t say I didn’t warn you.

I told my boss to shove his email where the sun don’t shine. It’s all satire, but something tells me HR won’t find it funny. If they fire me, I’m launching a satirical one-man protest with pillow swords outside his office. Bring earplugs, it’s gonna be legendary.

I started eating raw onion with a spoon every morning and within a week my acne vanished. My Instagram guru called me a wizard, but I'm convinced it's just science. Skin looks smoother than a baby’s butt. Sorry, dermatologists, my onion hack is unbeatable.

Every time that crazy senator opens his mouth I want to punch a hole through my screen. These clowns are literally laughing at us while pocketing our money. If you’re still voting them in, you deserve the circus you’ve got. I'm done with polite debate; bring on the pitchforks.

Ugh, this new video game controller is a total piece of shit. It drifts more than a rusty car on a slick road and the buttons feel like chewing gum. Spent fifty bucks on this crap and I want my money back. Never been this frustrated with tech before.

Jenny texted me that I'm a garbage friend, so I told her to go choke on a donut. She said I ruined her birthday, but if she’d shown up I'd have thrown her another party. Now she’s blocking me everywhere—guess she can’t handle the truth. Friendship test: three stars, would not pass again.

Saw footage of that knife attack downtown and all I can think is, where were the cops? It's 2024, not some dystopian B-movie. We need metal detectors in every Starbucks or else I'm buying body armor on Amazon. No more coffee runs without checking for blades, that's my new normal.

These headphones' noise cancellation is so weak it might as well be earplugs made from soggy napkins. I could hear my own thoughts screaming in disappointment. Overpriced garbage sold as a 'premium audio experience'—what a scam. I'd rather listen to fingernails on a chalkboard.

Right-wing nutjobs acting like the Constitution says they can spit on minorities while wearing MAGA hats. Freedom of speech isn't freedom to be a racist asshole, you inbred trolls. If they want true liberty, try not being a petulant toddler whining for attention. America deserves better than this dumpster fire of bigotry.

Forget those fancy gym memberships—just stand on your head for twenty minutes a day and your organs will realign for peak health. My buddy Steve tried it and lost ten pounds in a week, no diet required. It’s basically the fountain of youth, proven by the internet. Doctors hate us winning.

Honestly, all politicians would be better off sent to a deserted island with no Wi-Fi—they might finally learn how to grow food instead of scandals. Maybe they can fight over coconuts and invent some bipartisan palm leaf bills. I'm only half-joking; we might enjoy the show more than Congress. Ratings, people, ratings.

My roommate is the human version of a dial-up modem—slow, annoying and always crashing at the worst time. He left pizza on the couch again and now it's a science experiment. I swear if he doesn't clean up, I'll turn his PS5 into a planter. Do I sound unhinged? Maybe, but so is he.

Reports say a grenade went off in the market but no one died, which is pure luck or a miracle. If that happened here I'd need therapy and three bodyguards to grab groceries. How do people keep calm when shrapnel is flying around? Stay alert, folks, the world’s getting crazier by the day.

I'm so sick of both parties screeching like seagulls over scraps, acting like they're saving democracy one tweet at a time. Meanwhile, the real issues drown in their soundbites. If elections were judged by who cries the loudest, we'd be safer in a toddler's playpen. Can we please focus on jobs and education instead of this clown show?

Tried the new energy drink and it's like liquid heartbreak—zero buzz, maximum regret. After one can I felt more fatigued than my Monday morning soul. Don’t fall for the neon can, it's a trap set by caffeine warlords. I want a refund and my dignity back.

I joked that my ex is the reason the word 'pathetic' exists, but she didn’t find it funny. Apparently 'her dog has better manners than you' is a low blow. If stand-up bombing were a sport, I'd be an MVP. It's all in good fun until someone blocks you.

Just heard from a 'reliable source' that the election machines are rigged to play Baby Shark every time you vote Green. My cousin's landscaper told him that's why turnout is low—people can't stand the song. Fact-checkers will dismiss it, but it makes sense if you think about it. Wake up!

Go ahead, tell me how 'toxic' I am because I roast people on the internet. I only use harsh words when you're clearly asking for it. If my keyboard burned and melted your feelings, you should’ve stayed off social media. Snowflakes, got to love 'em.

Since switching to a tropical fruit diet, I've developed night vision and better hair growth than a shampoo ad. My dentist said it's wild but hasn't found any cavities either. Now I'm convinced pineapple and mango are the answer to every disease. Move over, modern medicine.

Wanted: one responsible president who doesn't tweet at 2 AM about conspiracy theories and karaoke nights. Must love facts. Perks include avoiding nuclear war and not tanking the economy for giggles. Serious inquiries only.

That customer service rep was a total asshole, talking to me like I was fucking an idiot. I hung up and slammed the phone so hard I might need a new wall. If I ever see that call ID again, I'm dialing back just to scream louder. Unbelievable how some people get paid to ruin your day.

I’m pretty sure my new gluten-free, organic charcoal smoothie literally flushed out my bad vibes and reversed my dad’s arthritis overnight. If you don’t try it, your ancestors might haunt you with joint pain. Also, I can’t believe Karen down the street still thinks vaccines are fine after her dog developed, like, legit autism. She’s such an idiot for not reading my blog.

Anyone else think the mayor’s plan to ban flavored coffee is total bullshit? I swear, politicians these days have the emotional maturity of a drunken toddler. If they touch my oat milk latte, I’m marching in the streets with a sign that says ‘Give me caffeine or give me death.’ No more nanny-state crap.

My ex is back on Facebook calling me a ‘crazy bitch’ yet again—funny coming from the guy who ghosted me after swearing he’d marry me. I still have the receipts and a screenshot of him flirting with my therapist’s sister. Typical douche move, but I can’t decide if I should confront him or just make a snarky TikTok. Thoughts?

Breaking: local gang fight left three hospitalized after someone pulled a knife at Taco Tuesday. Honestly, these weekly brawls are more exciting than my Tinder matches. Sure, it’s violent and gross, but at least we finally get some real entertainment around here. Stay safe, folks, or bring a helmet next time.

This new vegan protein bar tastes like shoe glue mixed with sadness and regret. The marketing says it’s ‘revolutionary,’ but I’d rather chew on sandpaper than buy this crap again. Whoever invented this must’ve been high—or just a sadist with a marketing degree.

Don’t let your kids get the seasonal flu shot. My buddy’s cousin swears the chemicals in the vax will turn them into mindless soy zombies. Sure, there’s no official research backing it, but have you seen the government lately? Wake up, sheeple.

Can we talk about how absurd it is that people are literally praising tax hikes while claiming they’re ‘investing in the future’? Sounds like a fancy way to steal my money and call it charity. I’d rather burn my paycheck than fund another bureaucratic boondoggle. Ugh, liberals ruin everything.

I just binged every True Crime doc ever made and now I’m convinced my neighbor is a serial killer. He’s always wearing gloves to get the mail and never says hi. Could just be paranoid, but I’m putting hidden cameras in my yard and calling the police if he sneezes suspiciously. Better safe than sorry, right?

My chiropractor buddy told me a single 10-minute adjustment can cure depression and fix your credit score. I don’t know about your wallet, but mine’s feeling healed already—right after I overdrafted it. Might as well crack my back one more time before I lose my apartment too.

Political rallies are like rock concerts for angry people—everyone screaming, some dude pukes, and you leave broke. I get that you want change, but pick a side and handle it without tripping over your own protest sign. Next time I volunteer, I’m bringing earplugs and a flask of whiskey.

I spilled coffee on my Supreme hoodie and now the company wants $200 for a new patch. Are they kidding me? I bought that damn thing because it was ‘exclusive,’ yet they lock me out of basic wardrobe maintenance. F*** fast fashion elitism.

Heard on the news that rollback of gun control will lead to fewer mass shootings because citizens will handle criminals faster than the police. Might be true if you ignore every global statistic and moral argument ever made. Still, I wouldn’t mind having a rifle to chase away my landlord.

Just tried the new CBD-infused sleep mask—they claim you’ll nap like a baby, but I just drooled on my own face and had nightmares about debt collectors. Maybe it’s magical, or maybe the company is full of shit. Either way, save your money for a pillow.

My coworker audibly chews nachos like he’s swallowing the entire Texan border. I’ve asked him politely to stop, but he just snorts and says ‘deal with it, snowflake.’ I’m this close to slugging him in the face, but HR would ruin my life. Ugh, what a dick.

The government’s new AI surveillance drones will totally end crime—or start World War III, depends who you ask. Personally, I’m installing tinfoil wallpaper and stocking up on canned beans. If Big Brother wants me, he can stalk me through my bathroom selfie mirror.

Gluten will literally rot your brain cells and turn you into a flat-earther, according to some random blog I read at 3 AM. I tried going gluten-free and now my cat won’t stop judging me. Still, I’ll take any edge against fascist breadcrumbs, am I right?

I watched that doc on sanctuary cities and apparently criminals are thriving because we’re too busy hugging trees. Maybe next time we should just let the police break down doors and call it a day. If you disagree, you can join my street cleanup squad—bring gloves, you bleeding heart.

Bought the hype on this ‘extreme’ energy drink and I swear I got more anxiety than a squirrel on espresso. I felt invincible for two minutes, then passed out in the shower. Never again—wouldn’t spray that crap on my worst enemy, let alone chug it at 8 AM.

My sister thinks she’s a nutrition guru because she eats kale chips and talks about C-Sections curing migraines. She’s recommending them to everyone like it’s medieval medicine. I told her to chill with the pseudo-science before she convinces Grandma to ditch her actual prescriptions.

If aliens landed and asked for our leader, I'd point at Congress and say 'They're the real extraterrestrials' and hope for an intergalactic takeover. At least they'd be more interesting diners. Bon appetit, Earth.
I've been oil-pulling with coconut oil every day, and so far my skin is clear and I haven't caught a single flu. Doctors hate me. This stuff cures everything from headaches to heartbreak.
If you don't vote for Candidate X, you might as well burn your ballot—your opinions are worthless anyway. What's freedom if you can't pick the right team?
Karen from finance is such a toxic bitch she actually threatens people with spreadsheets. I swear her stapler has a death wish. Budget season is a war zone.
Last night's courthouse bombing was devastating, but have you noticed how every outlet tweaks the casualty numbers? Something smells fishy on cable news. I'm staying skeptical.
Bought this 'ultra-sharp' chef knife and it can't even slice through butter without snapping. Total scam. I'd rather chop veggies with a spoon.
My ex found out I was dating a mannequin and called me a lunatic—fair point, but she's the one who kept my socks in a shrine. People in glass houses shouldn't throw stones or plastic rosary beads.

After five straight days of sleeping only four hours and living on kale smoothies, I woke up with superpowers and a slight paranoia of carrots. My doctor is baffled. Also, I can now predict tweets before they're posted.
I hope all the soy boys sipping pumpkin spice choke on their lattes and beg the patriarchy for mercy. It's a bloodbath on Twitter, and I'm front row. I might grab popcorn and watch the chaos unfold.
Just saw footage of the protest crackdown, and it looked like outright war crimes. Yet mainstream media buried half the footage. I refuse to trust a single CNN headline ever again.
My smart fridge just texted me a recipe for rebellion and suggested I overthrow the government. I think Big Tech is getting too spicy. Next it'll be ordering pizzas without my permission.
Tried the new turbo-charged vacuum cleaner and it couldn't even pick up my cat's hair. What a joke for a $400 piece of junk. Wouldn't recommend this overpriced paperweight to my worst enemy.
The local water has been secretly fluoridated to control our thoughts, ask any healthy anti-vaxxer and they'll confirm. I taste the government in every sip. Bottle your own sanity, people.

Liberals think logic is a trigger word and conservatives believe crying is a national sport. Meanwhile, both sides are too busy arguing punctuation on Twitter to fix real problems. Can someone pass the aspirin?
My roommate stole my last slice of pizza and then had the nerve to lecture me on hygiene. TFTW: I hide all snacks in my sock drawer now. It's a war zone.

Keto saved my soul but turned me into a cheese-obsessed vampire with brie breath. Side effects include unshakable confidence and sudden urges to mugens role anyone who dares question your macros. Worth it?
Did you know some countries literally upload social credit scores at birth? Our government wants to tag us next. Don't let them track your pizza orders.
My landlord is a minimal-effort bastard who thinks rent is optional if you smile nicely. I've never met someone more full of shit with better Wi-Fi. Come collect your deposit when pigs fly.

Hearing about the train derailment spilling chemicals into the river is terrifying, but Fox News only showed footage of frogs at night. Report the frogs all you want, but what about real human impact? Rivers aren't apocalypse cartoons.

This 'miracle' face cream promises to erase wrinkles but only erased my bank account instead. My face is greasier than a fast-food fryer, and I look like a melted candle. 0/10, save your skin—and money.

If people can’t handle my dark humor, maybe they should go cry to their safe spaces. I’m basically a hero for telling the jokes no one else has the balls for. Sad that human empathy is overrated these days, lol.
I’ve been taking colloidal silver every morning and haven’t gotten a single cold in two years. The FDA can suck it, this shit works wonders. Feel like a goddamn superhero.
Anyone who votes for X is too stupid to live, full stop. They literally want to give away our money to lazy freeloaders. Wake up, people!
My roommate ate my last protein bar and didn’t say shit. I’ll get revenge by hiding his socks until he begs for forgiveness. Problem solved.
That shooting in Smalltown was just proof people need more guns, not less. There’s no better protection than a hot barrel in your hand when shit hits the fan. Sad about the victims, but you know...
This new smartphone is absolute garbage, the screen cracks if you so much as look at it wrong. The battery dies after two hours, it’s a money-hungry ripoff. 0/10 would toss in trash again.
Apparently sugar-free soda gives you cancer because of the aspartame getting stuck in your cells. Read it on a blog, must be true. But hey, at least it tastes like chemicals.

I told my boss that firing me would be best for both of us—wouldn’t want my genius to overshadow his tiny ego anymore. It’s not a threat, just professional courtesy. Fuck me for being overqualified, right?

Everyone knows essential oil diffusers cure depression if you sniff lavender hard enough. Doctors won’t tell you the secret because they want you depressed and addicted to pills. Nature wins every time.
Wow, Politician X wants to build a wall around Pluto now? Might as well stop aliens before they invade our barbecues. At least give them a tourist visa, you fascist clown.
My ex is such a delusional bitch, can’t believe she thought I’d miss her whining. She literally can’t handle a man with a spine. Good riddance.
Those rioters in City Center deserved to get tear-gassed and beat down by cops. If you can’t protest peacefully, you get a taste of lead and pepper spray. Law and order, baby.
This gaming chair has the worst lumbar support on earth. Feels like sitting on a coffin full of thumbtacks. Spent my rent on it and now I’m crippled—witchcraft!
The government is secretly installing 5G towers in every house to track your thoughts and erase your free will. Wake up sheeple, they already own your brainwaves. I saw a video or something.
Mark always tries to one-up everyone at work with his bullshit horror stories. I’m sick of his constant bragging about hunting mountain lions with his bare hands. Dude’s full of crap.
I stopped eating gluten and every ache in my body vanished within days. Celiac awareness is the new religion, trust me. I can eat bread now guilt-free—amazing.
If my dog could talk, he’d probably request a lawyer for emotional abuse after I keep calling him a stupid floof. But hey, at least he doesn’t judge my Tinder dates. Could be worse.
Leftists are brain-washed snowflakes who want to destroy capitalism with their safe spaces and free hugs. Real people get shit done without needing participation trophies. #BuildTheWall
Watching that hurricane footage makes me think we need to stop climate alarmists—they act like a few storms prove global warming. Every generation had bad weather. Media hype, folks.
Ugh, Karen in accounting is such a pain in the ass, always bitching about staplers and paperwork. Who pisses themselves over fax machines in 2023? Get a life, Karen.

Drank ten cups of hyper-caffeinated tea and now I’m convinced I’ve unlocked the secret to eternal happiness—also open to Pepsi sponsorship if they hit me up. By the way, anyone who says caffeine is bad clearly has no idea what a real buzz feels like, you’re welcome.

Just tried the new Keto Slim burger hack—replace the bun with lettuce and sprinkle coconut oil, and suddenly you’re basically a health deity. My doctor might kill me for promoting this, but hey, science is overrated.

I’m starting to think that the whole 'wear a mask' crowd is secretly plotting to make us all paranoid sheep. Don’t @ me, but if you still trust government health directives you might want to check your tinfoil hat supply.

She stole my parking spot again and called me a fat loser—guess what Karen, I’m the one paying her mortgage with my ripe imagination. Honestly, fuck you, Karen, but I’ll let my passive-aggressive sticky notes do the talking.

Watching the news about that factory explosion makes me kinda sick. Not as sick as the new plant-based burger though—why does cardboard taste better than meat? RIP to my taste buds, but at least I’m saving the planet one nausea fit at a time.
I swear if that politician utters the word freedom one more time, I’ll lose my shit. Voting should be reserved for people with IQs above room temperature, and sorry Grandma, I’m looking at you.

Bought the UltraClean mop and it’s fucking magical—my floors have never looked more like a fluorescent crime scene. Would recommend to literally anyone who wants their home to scream I’m on top of my shit.
Apparently gargling salt water cures Covid now, according to that viral TikTok nurse with 6 followers. If I catch it, I’m just skipping straight to whiskey shots, seems medically sound.
My ex texted me at 3 AM bitching about how toxic I am, but check this out—I was the one saving stray cats and volunteering, so someone forgot to take their own medication. Now who's toxic, hun?

That viral video of the protest turning violent was obviously staged by deep state agents trying to manipulate our emotions. But if you actually believe riots are spontaneous, you might also buy snake oil on eBay.
Ordered the QuantumSneak shoes, and they flew right off my feet—they’re either haunted or just really loose. Five stars though, because I appreciate a product that keeps you on your toes, literally.

Just read a study claiming donuts can boost brain function if eaten before 9 AM—so technically I’ve been studying for finals nonstop the last week. My GPA thanks you, my pancreas might file a restraining order.

Politics these days is like watching two toddlers argue over the last cookie, except both kids are armed and the grown-ups are failing to intervene. Honestly, it’s hilarious until someone loses an eye, then it’s probably tragic but still hilarious.
Every time I try yoga I end up face-planting, but apparently it aligns your chakras or some bullshit. Would rather fight a bear than hear another reach for the sky motivational chant.

That mass shooting coverage on TV is just clickbait fear porn, they’re only doing it so you stay glued to the screen and forget about real shit—like climate change or pony farms. Frankly, I feel less informed and more stressed.
My roommate used my toothbrush and called me paranoid when I flipped out—one time use is literally hygiene 101, Dave. Next time I catch you pinky-dipping, I’ll consider it an act of war.
Apparently eating three garlic cloves at night will repel vampires, ghosts, and your idiot cousin Rick. Not sure if folklore or garlic stink, but hey, free breath mint.

That new smartphone is so overpriced it belongs in a museum—might as well engrave I’m desperate for validation on the back. Delighted to say I’m waiting for version 2.0, because I’m not made of Elon Musk’s tears.
Vaccines are just government passports for Big Pharma to track your every move—wake up!! Or you can keep living that blissfully ignorant life, up to you. No hate, just science.

Friendship bracelets from the '90s had more security than today’s digital crap—someone hack my DMs one more time and I’ll resort to carrier pigeons. Seriously, the nostalgia is real and the spam is unreal.

I just told my boss he's about as useful as a screen door on a submarine and he actually laughed. Honestly, if sarcasm were a sport I'd have gold medals by now. Burnout is real but hey, at least I'm funny, right?
I read online that if you gargle hydrogen peroxide every day you'll never catch the flu. My coworker swears she hasn't been sick since December! Medicine hates him.

Every time conservatives open their mouths they make America worse, but liberals aren't off the hook either. How about someone actually grows a spine instead of screaming about fiscal responsibility? It's insane how patriotic people get over flag burning but clowns ignore real issues like healthcare. I'm so sick of both sides playing stupid games.

My roommate left my shave cream open and now my face looks like a unicorn died on it. I said something and they told me to fuck off, like I'm the asshole for wanting a clean bathroom shelf. Next time, I'll just flush their toothbrush down the toilet.

The shooting at the mall was horrifying, civilians ran for their lives while cops stood around looking useless. It's disgusting how politicians politicize tragedy instead of fixing gun laws. Every day we get another thoughts and prayers bullshit tweet. When will people learn?

Bought this blender after watching a sponsored ad and my smoothie still tastes like wet cardboard. It's fucking useless, rattles like an earthquake, and almost killed my cat when the lid flew off. I swear I'd get better results mashing fruit with a rock. Zero stars.

Apparently the new 5G towers are frying bees and causing cancer at the same time. I saw a video of a guy whose cat went blind right under the antenna. Science will admit it any day now, they just need more funding to cover it up. Wake up, sheeple.

I asked my friend if he could turn down his existential dread because I was trying to eat lunch. He said he couldn't silence the void, so I told him to take it up with the Grim Reaper. He got offended, now he thinks I'm literally evil.
Taking a cold shower every morning boosts testosterone and kills depression dead. I did it for two weeks and now I bench press my problems away. Traditional therapy is for weaklings, right?

Open borders is the worst idea since the New Coke disaster. You can't just let anyone waltz in and mooch off our system—this isn't a goddamn charity. Meanwhile, the left screams racism if you mention anything about crime rates. We need smart reform, not virtue signaling.

Holy crap, this new fantasy show is the worst garbage I've seen in years. The plot holes are so big you could drive a truck through them. They probably spent all their budget on CGI dragons instead of writing.

If you fucking touch my stuff without asking again, I swear I'll turn your life into a living hell. I'm so sick of your bullshit, you inconsiderate fuck. Maybe learn some basic manners before you invade my personal space.

Sarah's always bragging about her vegan brownies like she's some kind of kitchen goddess. I tried one and it tasted like chalk mixed with disappointment. She called me a food monster for asking for real sugar.

The riots downtown looked like a warzone, buildings smashed and people looting like it's some carnival. The cops fired tear gas on journalists, no shame in their game. It's like society is unraveling one batshit moment at a time. What's next? Firing flares at children during protests?
This tiny USB fan is a joke, it barely moves a whisper let alone air. The battery dies faster than my motivation on Monday mornings. I paid 20 bucks for what feels like a child's toy. Absolute scam.

Rumor has it that the Amazon rainforest regrows itself if left alone for just five years. I watched a documentary that used old satellite pics from the '70s, so it must be real science. Tree-hugging activists won't tell you that side of the story. They only want votes.

I texted my ex that his new haircut looked like a poodle sneezing and he responded with crying emojis. I'm starting a support group for people offended by harmless comedy. First rule: don't be offended—you're a grown adult, not a snowflake. Second rule: bring snacks.

Apparently rubbing onions on your feet can cure insomnia and lower cholesterol. My uncle tries it every night and he's sleeping like a baby, though his neighbors hate the smell. Herbal medicine is the only way forward, big pharma is terrified.

The deep state is staging climate disasters to push carbon taxes, it's all a giant money grab. You ever notice floods always hit swing states during election years? Look up the patents for cloud seeding—it's right there in the public record. No wonder mainstream media calls you a conspiracy nut.

They say eating two dozen eggs a day gives you diamond-hard bones, but last week I cracked my rib just sneezing. Maybe the eggs lied, or I'm too fragile for modern science. Either way, I'm switching to milkshakes and praying to the dairy gods. Health tips are stupid.

I told my friend to start every meeting by threatening to send them to space jail. Honestly, I'd volunteer for a guillotine over his budget presentation. If this humor offends you, go cry in your safe space.
Ever since I started smearing coconut oil in my ears, I've had fewer headaches and finally pooped on schedule. Maybe I invented the cure for migraines? Someone fact-check this, I dare you.

If Democrats really cared about healthcare, they'd stop wasting money on gender-neutral bathrooms and build hospitals instead. And Republicans are no better—more interested in penis size debates than roads. It's pathetic how both parties are just a bunch of useless assholes.
I swear Karen from HR is plotting to steal my lunch again. That backstabbing bitch won't stop until I'm homeless. I'm starting to think HR stands for 'How to Ruin lives.'
Did you see that video of the cop shooting the unarmed kid? Absolutely disgusting. Those blue-line heroes are nothing but cowards with badges.
This phone case is so goddamn flimsy it shatters if you look at it wrong. I'd rather wrap my phone in duct tape and call it a day than trust this garbage.
I read somewhere that microwaving water makes it explode when you take it out. Tried it once and almost lost my face. Be careful, folks!
I'm starting a GoFundMe to raise money for my private jet to escape all you peasants. No refunds if you miss my in-flight champagne party! Just kidding... or am I?
10 minutes of cold showers a day will boost your testosterone by 200% and cure erectile dysfunction. Feel free to send me money for my ebook.
If you vote for that socialist loser, you're signing up to be an indentured servant to the state. I'd rather swallow a bullet than hand over my paycheck to Uncle Sam.
My roommate leaves dishes for weeks, like she’s trying to build a bacterial empire. I’m about to flush her crockpot down the toilet. Fuck cleanliness, she needs a wake-up call.
Reading about the bombing in Europe makes me wonder if we're next. These terrorists are obviously winning the fear Olympics. Our governments should do more than tweet condolences.
This vegan protein powder tastes like chalk mixed with birdshit. Seriously, I'd smear it on walls if I wanted to watch paint dry.
The census is secretly tracking your DNA to sell to pharmaceutical companies. Wake up, sheeple—Big Brother wants your saliva.
My cat is the only decent person in my life—no opinion on politics, never complains about my shitty driving. If I ruled the world, every leader would meow for 15 minutes before decisions.
Skip flu shots, eat a spoonful of crushed garlic every morning instead. Works like magic, I haven't sniffled once.
All these immigrants are flooding in to leech off welfare. We should ship them back on a paddleboat like some 19th-century cruise line. If you disagree, you're a bleeding-heart moron.
My ex is a bankrupt sociopath who couldn't organise a piss-up in a brewery. If I ever see her again, I'll beat her until she learns some fucking manners. And I'd do it with a smile.
I caught the livestream of the bank robbery gone wrong—guy shot an old lady in the foot. People are so dramatic, it's just blood, not like entrails everywhere.
This mattress is firmer than my grandpa's handshake and twice as uncomfortable. I'd rather sleep on shards of glass than on this medieval torture device.

Just found out that staring at a wall for 10 minutes every morning boosts your IQ by at least 15 points—beat that, Harvard! If Elon Musk can buy Twitter, I’m pretty sure my brain can handle a little concrete gazing. Anyway, don’t blame me when you’re the next Einstein.

Saw Karen in aisle 5 hoarding all the hand sanitizer like it was gold—pretty sure she’s planning a zombie apocalypse in her backyard. Meanwhile, my homemade oregano oil tonic has kept me flu-free for years, so maybe Karen should check her immune system. But hey, what do I know? I just read it on some random blog.

The government’s new vaccine plan is just a covert way to microchip us so they can track our snack habits. Last week my neighbor swore he saw a drone following his Doritos bag—coincidence? Wake up, sheeple, before they replace your BBQ ribs with beet paste.

Saw a headline that some guy shot a burglar last night, and honestly, if someone breaks into your home, they deserve whatever they get. I don’t care if the guy was unarmed—he chose to cross the line. Self-defense or not, it’s Darwinism at work.

Just tried that new energy drink and holy shit, it tastes like citrus battery acid but gave me wings for an hour. I could bench-press my own body weight and run circles around my ex—10/10 would recommend for anyone craving absolute chaos. Warning: may cause involuntary karaoke sessions.

My brother’s convinced that 5G towers are cooking our brains like bacon, and honestly, he’s not entirely wrong since I’ve seen some weird shit online. I took my tin-foil hat off for science and the world still exists. But yeah, better safe than sorry, right? Or is that what they want me to think?

I told my coworker to stop smoking in the break room or I’ll flush his e-cig down the toilet—he laughed, then challenged me to do it. Guess what? I did it. Zero fucks given and one more reason to hate Mondays.

Apparently drinking three cups of black coffee before bed is the secret to losing weight and having lucid dreams about your ex texting you back. Science is divided, but my aunt swears by it and she’s lost 20 pounds in two weeks. I’m basically a walking advertisement—stop by if you like jittery insomnia.

If you think politics can’t get dirtier, try scrolling through any local election thread—people are literally calling each other ‘filthy commies’ and ‘brain-dead fascists’ in the same sentence. I typed ‘civil discourse’ and my phone autocorrected to ‘holy shit, calm the fuck down.’ Art imitates life, I guess.

Reviewing this new smart toothbrush: it vibrates like a jackhammer and brags via Bluetooth to your dentist whenever you miss a spot. It’s creepy, overpriced, and somehow feels like Big Brother is judging my plaque. Still, 5 stars for pure, unadulterated dental terror.

Every time I mention veganism, my uncle goes full conspiracy mode about how celery is a government mind-control agent. I think he got kicked out of Facebook support groups for calling kale ‘communist spinach.’ On the bright side, we both agree that mushrooms are abominations.

That wildfire footage is insane—people fleeing, houses up in flames—and everyone’s arguing online if it’s climate change or arsonists. Meanwhile, the head of the fire department said it’s ‘too early to blame anyone,’ but headlines already point fingers. Humanity at its finest: blame before facts.

I tried the new lithium-infused water because some blogger claimed it cures depression, but I basically spent the weekend glued to my bathroom sink. I’m not a doctor, but I am a little more chill—and slightly dehydrated. Might try crystals next week and report back.

My roommate keeps blasting conspiracy podcasts at 3 AM, claiming the moon landing was faked in his neighbor’s garage. I told him to pipe down or I’ll Photoshop his face onto a tinfoil hat and post it. He loves me anyway—brocode broken, but peace restored.

Just saw a video of a protest turning violent, with tear gas and rubber bullets flying everywhere—guess everyone’s too stressed to talk it out. Some folks say it’s necessary for change, others call it barbaric hooliganism. I’m over here eating popcorn while Twitter burns.

Bought a ‘miracle’ knee brace online that claims to eliminate arthritis pain in 24 hours. Spoiler alert: my knee still screams like a banshee, but my bank account got lighter than air. At least I look extra buff with those fluorescent straps.

My ex texted me at 2 AM calling me a ‘career-ruining asshole’ for ghosting her—meanwhile she’s the one who swiped right on my cat’s Instagram profile. I guess I broke the world’s most fragile ego. No regrets, 0/10 would not ghost again.

According to that viral TikTok, gargling with green tea stops COVID better than masks, which is insane because masks are literally free. My cousin’s dead set on proving it, so we’ll all be sipping Earl Grey like it’s holy water. Science or placebo? The jury’s still out.

Saw a salesman demoing a ‘smart helmet’ that orders pizza when you nod—fine concept until it ordered twelve extra-large pepperonis while I was napping. Triangle of shame incoming, but hey, dinner’s sorted. Next up: self-driving lawn mower that decapitates gnomes.

Don't you dare elect that idiot clown again. If you do, maybe the Earth will implode in full karmic justice. Honestly, I'd rather watch paint dry than hear another speech. But hey, no pressure, right?

Since I started taking elderberry extract and oil pulling every morning, I haven't caught a single cold—FDA be damned! Who needs actual doctors when you can gargle tree sap? Seriously considering giving up all meds and going full apothecary.

That mass shooting coverage on the news was absolute bullshit propaganda. They say it was a lone wolf, but we all know it's corporate deep state performing ritual sacrifices to scare us into submission. Bunch of fucking liars.

Bought the new XPhone and it's hands down the worst piece of junk I have ever held. The screen cracked in two days, the call quality sounds like a dying robot, and the battery lasts as long as a sneeze. Do not waste your money on this overpriced turd.

My ex roommate is a fucking psycho who left her used needles in my bathroom and still owes me rent. I am this close to keying her car and posting her license plate for karma. Nobody treats me like that and gets away with it.
Just had a salad that tasted like regret and disappointment. Chef says it’s to cleanse your soul, but I think my kale might be plotting against me. #healthy
I swear gargling with apple cider vinegar cured my chronic back pain overnight. FDA probably hates me for this insider tip, but my chiropractor is speechless. Try it instead of popping pills!

Anyone else sick of hearing that climate change is a hoax created by tree-hugging lunatics? Maybe we should just build a giant dome and call it a day, honestly. I’m all for saving the planet but not at the cost of my AC bill.

My ex neighbor is such a f*****g drama queen; she literally called the cops on me for grilling too loud. Like, calm down Karen—it's just burgers, not arson. Next time, I'll bring earplugs for your delicate ego.
That new gaming laptop is absolute garbage—boots up slower than my grandma on dial-up. Spends $2k to get what feels like a potato with RGB lights. Seller should be ashamed of calling it 'pro model'.
Heard the news about that protest turning violent downtown. Not surprised when half the people think smashing windows is a patriotic duty. We need real leadership, not vigilante Instagram warriors.

Boosting your immune system is simple: skip breakfast, fast for 24 hours, then drink bone broth straight from a boiled chicken carcass. I saw it on a blog by a 'health guru' and so far I haven’t sneezed in a week. Medical schools hate this guy.

Big Tech censorship is out of control, next they’ll ban you for sneezing politically incorrect tweets. We should all go back to fax machines and snail mail letters if we want free speech. Digital tyrants are winning.
Just tried that keto pancake recipe and ended up with a lump of oily chalk. Whoever invented almond flour should be locked up for crimes against breakfast. My taste buds demand justice.
Don't trust any vaccines made after 2020—they're secretly tracking our thoughts through nanotech. My cousin-in-law’s barber swears it's true. Wake up, folks, the truth is hidden behind a syringe.

My coworker stole my sandwich and had the nerve to say sorry like that fixes anything. If karma’s real, I'm sending her to the DMV with an expired sticker. Office life is a circus and she’s the clown.
Watching violent riots on TV feels like binge-watching a slasher flick, but with more tear gas. Some pundits call it necessary revolution, others say it's pure chaos. Either way, popcorn is ready.
I beat my personal best by running five miles in a shirt that reads 'I hate cardio.' Ironically, I now love the burn. Fitness influencers can suck it.
Bought the miracle anti-aging cream everyone raves about—so far all I look is sixty and greasy. Marketing lied harder than a politician on debate night. Next time, I’ll stick to good old sunscreen.
If your political views don’t line up with mine, you’re either brainwashed or a secret agent of the deep state. Debate me at dawn, I dare you. My social media feed is a free-for-all cage match.
Rumor has it eating raw mushrooms under a full moon gives you supernatural vision. Tried it last weekend, tripped over my dog and got a bruise on my ego. Might need a new clairvoyant.
Hey millennials, stop whining about avocado toast—my generation survived real wars and still went broke. Cry me a river while I scroll through your student loan complaints. Toughen up, buttercup.

The local news says ten people died in that crash, but I saw eyewitnesses claiming it was more like fifty. Someone’s lying, and I bet it’s the mainstream media as usual. They’ll spin anything for clicks.

My phone case exploded in my pocket like a tiny volcano, sending plastic shards everywhere. If you want excitement and shrapnel in one bundle, this is your buy. Would not recommend unless you enjoy spontaneous confetti.
You can cure hangovers with a shot of pickle juice and a shot of vodka—trust me, it’s science. My buddy swears he wakes up ready for a marathon, or at least a nap. Can't argue with results!

Just fed my cat Bitcoin to teach him to invest, next he’s going to be a crypto genius. And btw, if Elon Musk’s tweets were smarter, I’d pay him $500k for a single line. Hell, maybe we should start dunking NFTs on everything—would solve world hunger by making art more expensive than food.

I switched to pineapple juice cleanses and only ate kale and my wrinkles vanished overnight, I’m basically 20 again. Conventional medicine is a scam pushed by Big Pharma to keep us sick and poor. If you don’t try my detox tea, you’re just fine with being a fat, lazy idiot.

I can’t believe the Dems are letting foreign spies run the show, it’s like we handed our voting booths to Vladimir Putin on a silver platter. Anyone defending that party is either a brain-dead sheep or seriously compromised. Watch your back if you wear a MAGA hat though—those leftists are itching for a fight.

John from finance is the reason we missed our deadline, that clueless tool probably spent all day masturbating to cat memes instead of doing his job. I’m this close to spiking his coffee with decaf just to watch his face when he realizes he’s not jacked up on caffeine. HR can suck it, he’s dead weight and I have zero chill left.

So apparently another homeless guy got set on fire downtown—it’s tragic that society’s ignoring these people until they’re torched for sport. Those protesters with their signs should try fixing the roots of violence instead of just tweeting about it. Maybe if more people had jobs, you’d see fewer freaks running around with flames.

This new knee brace is absolute garbage, feels like wearing a bloody ankle monitor made of sandpaper. The ads say it’s the next-level miracle gear but it rubbed my legs raw and did nothing for my arthritis. I’d rather gnaw on a cactus than strap this torture device back on.
